message:
chore: extend .gitignore with agent-specific ephemeral patterns

Add ignore rules for alternate build target directories
(target_check_cc/, target_local/) used by concurrent agents, and
beads issue tracker history backups (.beads/.br_history/) that
are local-only and should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -70,3 +70,10 @@ __pycache__/
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# Alternate build target directories (agent-specific)
+/target_check_cc/
+/target_local/
+
+# Beads issue tracker history backups
+.beads/.br_history/
